title: The Cosmo Gang Uses the Trial and Error Method to Solve the Tennis Court Puzzle
description:
Round 2 of another match with GameBop (molhal)

This turned out a lot longer than I originally intended (actually this is the longest video I've ever uploaded to this account), especially considering that we're trying to make this match last for a lot of rounds. Hopefully we can decrease the length in future rounds. 

Added:
- GameBop's Pokemon Glitch Videos
- Forever Worlds
- GameBop's Drawing of RabbitSnore
- Jewels of the Oracle
- Round 4 of the original Mycro vs. GameBop
- Riven
- Bonk the Caveman trolls a bird's forum
- Mystery of Time and Space
- Alida
- Sonic Advance 2
- Screenshots of the project file for this
- Round 6 of the original Mycro vs. GameBop
- Obsidian
- Dunspace Deception
- Floating Runner
- Either 15 or 17 Minutes

Audio:
- Super Monkey Ball - "Sky" Level Music
- Jewels of the Oracle - Memory of Bandahm
- Jewels of the Oracle - Panditah of the Seventh Mountain
- Sparkster - Stage 1-1
- Pokemon RSE - Route 113
- Jewels of the Oracle - Parity of Jalam

Oh yeah, and this isn't video game only tennis like the serve says it is. We're reusing one of GameBop's serves from a while ago.
